products.title: Sell Any Product or Service with Ease
products.subtitle: A system already tailored and automated to sell almost any product or service online — simply and quickly.

features.title: All-in-One Integrated Features
features.subtitle: From building web pages and landing pages, to checkout, digital payments, invoices, order management, marketing campaigns, and customer management

goOnline.title: Save Time. Go Online in 2 Minutes
goOnline.body1: Selling any product or service on the internet is easier with Mayar. Web landing pages, catalog, checkout, order & customer management automatically adapt to what you sell.
goOnline.body2: Making Mayar the only platform built with a truly industry-agnostic approach.

kelas-online.title: Course: Build a Web App with Soft Skills
kelas-online.blurb: Video courses to build fully functional web apps with no-code tools like Soft, Mayar, and Canva.

e-book.title: Playbook: Frictionless Checkout for Creators
e-book.blurb: A practical guide to set up your Mayar landing page, catalog, and checkout so digital products are ready to sell in minutes.

membership.title: Club: Monthly Premium Content Access
membership.blurb: Subscribe to content, community, and live sessions. Recurring payments run automatically — members get in, you keep creating.

webinar.title: Webinar: Launch a Digital Product This Week
webinar.blurb: A 90-minute live session + Q&A. Tickets, reminders, and recording access unlock automatically after payment.

integrations.title: Cut Integration & Development Cost
integrations.body: Mayar is already integrated with Indonesia’s major payment methods, logistics carriers, WhatsApp, Telegram, and 5,000+ apps via Zapier and Pipedream — no custom plumbing required.
integrations.hubBlurb: Payments · logistics · 5,000+ apps via Zapier & Pipedream

marketing.title: Grow Sales with Marketing
marketing.body: Store customer data and build relationships with marketing tools like email blasts, promo codes, bundling, upselling, cross-selling, and no-code integrations to thousands of apps.

labor-day.title: Year-End Promo
labor-day.toastSub: New Year special ready to send

buyer.body: Mayar’s 1-Click Checkout makes it easy for customers to buy your products or services. No more retyping details every purchase — Mayar fills their data in automatically.

merchant.titleBefore: Wherever you are, lift conversion for new and returning customers
merchant.bodyAfter: , your business gets paid with higher conversion.

toast.title: Profile and address filled in automatically

testimonials.label: Testimonials?
testimonials.title: What They Say…
testimonials.blurb: Our users love us — and we keep raising the bar, shipping more features, and co-building with customers for what comes next

videos.kang-aviv: How Mayar streamlines class checkout at Kang Aviv Institute
videos.anang: A side-income solution for content creators with Anang Marjono
videos.dinar: A non-technical-friendly platform for selling digital products with Dinar The HR
videos.rinaldi: Manage event tickets & attendees without the hassle — Rinaldi Rizki, KHP Event

quotes.greenpeace: The payment features Mayar provides help us accelerate online donation transactions for prospective Greenpeace Indonesia donors. That matters for an organization that always prioritizes donor experience. Crowdfunding and donation tools are useful for us. Most importantly, setup is easy and it integrates with our in-house platform. Customer support has been responsive and solution-oriented so far.
quotes.digitalskola: This service is very helpful for our payment process — we’d just like to see the dashboard features developed further.
quotes.bossexcel: mayar.id is an amazing super-app for content creators and educators who want to simplify teaching. From instant payments and landing pages to class features like bundling, cross-selling, and flexible payments — it’s all here. Don’t hesitate to try it for a better teaching and creating experience.
quotes.pacmann: Mayar makes checkout for Pacmann classes so much easier, especially with many payment options. Setting up payment links is no-code and straightforward, which lightens our workload. Automated email, discount/promo codes, and more also reduce the need to build similar systems ourselves. Support is fast and open to our demanding requests. Thank you, Mayar!
quotes.srz: Using Mayar has made our sales process much more efficient. Registration for webinars is faster and easier for customers. Mayar also supports our company’s Customer Relationship Management (CRM).
quotes.parenting-berdua: Alhamdulillah, we’ve partnered with Mayar for several months and it’s been incredibly helpful. The features fully match our needs as an online class and e-book provider.
quotes.hope: Perhaps the only platform we know that ships feature updates this fast. It’s so complete that fundraising is much easier for us. Thank you to Mayar for always responding quickly when we have questions or issues — and for listening to customers, proven by shipping features we asked for.
quotes.tibra: I’ve used Mayar for almost a year. I started on free and moved to the business plan because the benefits are huge. We used to handle event payments manually; now it’s far more automated. We use events, discount/promo codes, and payment links the most. The team is open-minded about feedback, so the platform keeps improving.
quotes.yayasan-guru-belajar: What I love most about Mayar is the API — easy to use and simpler than similar solutions. It made integrating with Yayasan Guru Belajar’s systems faster and smoother.
quotes.anang-quote: As creators we care a lot about fees — and Mayar is very competitive. The smaller the cut, the more control stays with the creator.
quotes.dinar-quote: For friends who run a business but aren’t ‘business people’ at heart — Mayar is a great ops partner because it’s easy to use and support is excellent.
quotes.maksimalindiri: One platform for e-books, webinars, and classes — Mayar makes creator side income far tidier and easier to manage.
